title: Bad Plugin Manifest
objective: Attempt to install an invalid plugin fixture, require OpenClaw to reject it cleanly, and verify the gateway remains healthy.

phases.title: Provision Plugin Env
phases.intent: Start a clean gateway before attempting the invalid plugin install.

phases.title: Reject Invalid Plugin
phases.intent: Run the real install command and require it to fail without corrupting plugin state.

phases.title: Post-Failure Health
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw still answers status and plugin list after rejecting the bad manifest.
